# ZIVOX

> Premium cinematic streaming platform

## About

ZIVOX is a free, premium streaming platform for watching movies, TV shows, and anime in HD quality. It features a cinematic dark UI, multiple streaming servers with automatic source testing, sandbox protection, watch history, favorites, and auto-play next episode.

## Features

- Stream movies, TV shows, and anime in HD
- 15+ streaming servers with automatic quality testing
- Sandbox protection for safe browsing
- Watch history and progress tracking
- Favorites and watchlist management
- Auto-play next episode
- Mobile-optimized responsive design
- No account required
- Genre-based discovery with 20+ categories
- Watch Party sharing with friends

## Content Categories

- Movies (Action, Comedy, Drama, Horror, Sci-Fi, Thriller, and more)
- TV Shows (Popular, Top Rated, Currently Airing)
- Anime (Subbed and Dubbed)

## URLs

- Homepage: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/
- Movies: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/movies
- TV Shows: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/tv
- Anime: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/anime
- Discover: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/discover
- Search: https://zivox-streaming.vercel.app/search
